stepTexts.0: Get comfortable. Take me in your hand, and start by stroking up… and down.
stepTexts.18: Very good. Speed up a little.
stepTexts.30: Mmm… you're sweet. But you'll have to do a bit more than that. Place your lips on the tip.
stepTexts.41: Stick out your tongue a bit and lick it.
stepTexts.56: Stop. Open your mouth. Slip it in gently.
stepTexts.62: Perfect. Now you start sucking. Up, then down. Slowly.
stepTexts.69: You're handling this beautifully. Keep going.
stepTexts.93: Take it back in your mouth, a bit faster.
stepTexts.107: You can play with your tongue while you suck. You're doing this very well.
stepTexts.121: Pick up the pace a little.
stepTexts.133: That's it. Stay there now. You like it?
